song.title: 051 - 谷中的百合花 The Lily of the Valley
song.lyrics:
[V1] 主耶稣是我密友,又是我的万有, I have found a friend in Jesus, He’s everything to me 超乎万人,我心全归祂所有; He’s the fairest of ten thousand To my soul;
祂是谷中百合花,我心单单爱祂, The Lily of the Valley, In Him alone I see 洗我洁净,使我完全又无瑕。 All I need to cleanse And make me fully whole 忧愁,祂在我心房;患难,有祂抵挡; In sorrow He's comfort, In trouble He's my stay, 一切重担今都担在祂肩上。 He tells me every care on Him to roll.
[C] 祂是晨星光炳烁, He’s the Lily of the Valley, 谷中百合美秀, The Bright and Morning Star, 超乎万人, He’s the fairest of 我心全归祂所有。 ten thousand to my soul.
[V2] 主担我一切忧伤,背负我的惆怅, He all my griefs has taken, And all my sorrows borne; 试探来临,祂是我坚固保障; In temptation He’s my strong and mighty tow’r; 因祂,偶像失光芒; 因祂,万事失丧; I have all for Him forsaken, And all my idols torn, 现今蒙祂能力保守何安康。 From my heart And now He keeps me by His pow’r. 纵然世界算我亡,纵然仇敌猖狂, Though all the world forsake me, And Satan tempt me sore, 有主同行直到路终,勇前往。 Through Jesus I shall safely reach the goal.
[V3] 主永远与我同行,永不将我撇下, He will never, never leave me, Nor yet forsake me here 我今因信行祂旨意,心昂扬; While I live by faith And do His blessed will; 祂作我四围火城,我就无所惧怕, A wall of fire about me, I’ve nothing now to fear, 祂作吗哪,使我灵魂得饱享。 With His manna, He my hungry soul shall fill; 当我被提荣耀中,见祂可颂容华, Then sweeping up to glory, To see His blessed face, 欢喜乐河滚滚,涌流何久长。 Where rivers of delight shall ever roll.
